title: Sadiq Adebiyi
extract:
Sadiq Adebiyi  (born 8 January 1997) is a Nigerian professional rugby league footballer who plays as a loose forward, second-row or prop for the London Broncos in the Betfred Championship and Nigeria at international level.
Adebiyi played for London Broncos between 2015 and 2021 with loan spells at  Hemel Stags, Oxford and London Skolars in League 1, and Oldham and the Sheffield Eagles in the Championship.
